name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I’m asking you one last time:
body:
This is it. | | Derek --

This is the last time I’ll ask you to **[chip in to this campaign.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjcwMDI0NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMjk2MjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

If you’re with me, I need you to show it. Just $1 would mean the world to me.

**It’s your last chance. Let’s go for the win.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjcwMDI0NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMjk2MjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
---
**[**Derek, donate now: $5**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjcwMDI0NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMjk2MjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $10**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjcwMDI0NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMjk2MjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $25**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjcwMDI0NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMjk2MjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjcwMDI0NjIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMjk2MjY1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**
Thanks for everything. No matter what happens tomorrow, I’m so grateful you’ve been by my side.

Hillary

**Derek's Supporter Record**

Status: N/A
Last Contribution Date: None on record
Days until Election Day: 1
Suggested Contribution: $1

name: Evan Bayh
subject: Leave it all on the field
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50609/7be36b49/1e2dc9ac/78f99dfd/1346825731/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

I got into this campaign because I couldn't sit on the sidelines watching as partisanship grinds Washington to a halt. That motivation has carried me through the ups and downs of this campaign, and I feel it now more than ever. **Hoosier middle-class families can 't afford to continue down this road of divisiveness and finger-pointing.**

I know you agree that it's time to break the gridlock because you've been with me every step of this campaign.

**[Chip in $5 today to help this campaign leave everything on the field -- to show that we've done everything we can to change Washington for the better.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50609/7be36b49/1e2dc9ac/78f99dfc/1346825731/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.3nd&amount=10")**

The other side has spent millions. They've spread lies about my record. And their special interest allies have come to Indiana to pile on.

But it won't matter if we can turn out our voters tomorrow. **[Will you make a $5 contribution so our volunteers have all the resources they need to get our voters to the polls?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50609/7be36b49/1e2dc9ac/78f99dfc/1346825731/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.3nd&amount=10")**

**And above all else --_vote_! **Set aside some time, make a plan, and make sure your friends and family are getting to the polls, too. There is too much on the line to sit on the sidelines.

Let's finish strong,

Evan **************[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50609/7be36b49/1e2dc9ac/78f99dc3/1346825731/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161107.3nd&amount=25")**************
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50609/7be36b49/1e2dc9ac/78f99dc2/1346825731/VEsD/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.
---

subject: barely hanging on (Rubio)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e03/738133e4/334a6ef3/7f85bd49/1594793400/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm5?refcode=pme161107pm5_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| This isn't over, yet. Just this morning, a new poll showed us up by ONE POINT! But this weekend, _Real Clear Politics_ reported that "the battle for control of the Senate remains a tossup." And winning here in Florida is CRITICAL for Democrats to retake control!

Look. The _National Journal_ wrote that our race "is looking very close even as Republicans have outspent Democrats by $22 million since August."

_But get this: their millions of dollars haven 't moved the needle._ We're giving Marco Rubio the fight of his life. He's "still fighting for his political career in Florida," and he's just barely clinging on, even after McConnell threw in his last minute cash. **We need more money to keep the lead and finish strong.** [**Can you give $8 to send Marco packing?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e03/738133e4/334a6ef3/7f85bd49/1594793400/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm5?refcode=pme161107pm5_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

We can defeat Marco Rubio once and for all. But it's not going to happen unless we meet this last fundraising goal and are able to get out the vote for Patrick. [**All gifts will be matched for 4 more hours, and you 'll have double the impact on turning Florida blue and deciding control of the Senate. **](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e03/738133e4/334a6ef3/7f85bd49/1594793400/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm5?refcode=pme161107pm5_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**[Can you help out one last time?](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e03/738133e4/334a6ef3/7f85bd49/1594793400/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm5?refcode=pme161107pm5_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**

Thanks,
Team Murphy |

body:

name: Bill Clinton
subject: I can't wait for tomorrow
body:
Are you ready? | Derek --

You’re part of the incredible team that has propelled Hillary throughout this campaign. Each of you is a change-maker in your own right.

Now it's time to get out there and vote.

It's never been easier -- **[confirm your polling place right here, and get ready to cast your ballot.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

This election is the most important of our lives. What happens tomorrow will determine the course of our nation for generations. It will change the lives of people around the world.

Millions of Americans will head out to vote tomorrow. I hope you'll join your friends and neighbors at the polls. **Confirm your polling place right now -- and thank you for all you are doing, Derek:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Bill

P.S After you’ve cast your ballot, please make sure your friends and family do, too. **[Share this link with them before polls open tomorrow!](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

| **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjcwMDM1MDIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzExODU0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Deborah Ross
subject: Nothing left but to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Ok, I'll make this quick because we have a big day tomorrow.

It's Election Day tomorrow, and I'm confident we can win. Our campaign is built on a rock solid foundation of grassroots supporters. We've brought together North Carolinians from our 100 counties and supporters across the nation.

Our success has proven that North Carolinians are fed up with having their interests overlooked by lawmakers who are only concerned about their own political careers and special interest groups.

[_**Now is the time to do something about it. Help us strengthen our Get Out the Vote effort tomorrow and win an important victory. | I'm giving this all I have everyone, but I can't do it alone. I'll make this quick:

I've been crisscrossing the state with President Obama, Joe Biden, Tim Kaine, and Hillary Clinton. They've called out Marco Rubio for his failure to show up and fight for Florida. And I'm so grateful they believe in me. **This is our chance to make a real difference for Florida and for our country. I 'm fired up. [Can you give $5 now to GOTV tomorrow?](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e00/738133e4/334eaf37/7f85bd26/3350310900/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm6?refcode=pme161107pm6_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**

We are locked in a tossup race -- a new poll out today shows us up by**just one point.** You know how we win? By getting voters to the polls. And to do that, we need every single dollar possible in the bank by tomorrow to get out every last vote.

Every cent we earn will go straight to reaching out to voters to make sure they turn out in droves for Dems tomorrow. So I'm asking you directly. [**Can you help? All gifts will be matched for just a few more hours >>**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e00/738133e4/334eaf37/7f85bd26/3350310900/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161107pm6?refcode=pme161107pm6_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thank you,
Patrick

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Before tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Be a winner tonight. |
* * *
Please find a special message from one of our advertisers, Trump Make America Great Again Committee.
* * *
---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634533:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)
Peter,

Your support has meant the world to me and my family.

Remember when we were at 1% in the polls, and the media said we could never win the primary? You are the reason we stand here today.

And tonight we have the opportunity to prove them wrong once again. _Tonight is our chance to write the greatest American comeback story in the history of politics._

My team is going to be giving me a list of Election Day Donors who stepped up to help fund an emergency pool of resources as game-day decisions are made in critical states between now and the close of polls.

I'll be on calls with our political director all day, determining which states need last-minute resources.

[**Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FINAL contribution of the entire election.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634533:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $100 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634534:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $75 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634535:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634536:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $25 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634537:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $5 NOW](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634538:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634533:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)**
You have the chance to join your fellow Americans in writing the story -- that November 8, 2016 became the day _We The People_ took back our country and delivered justice to the forgotten men and women of America.

WHEN WE WIN, the fight will just be getting started. We'll have our work cut out for us over the next four years to fix our broken political system, reverse the damage of the last eight years, and drain the swamp of corruption in Washington.

Your contribution today will be a sign of unwavering support at the final hour, and will help fund an emergency pool of resources used for last-minute decisions based on our internal polls.

[**Please make your last contribution of the entire campaign and get on my list of Election Day Donors.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38634533:s_BEiDunN:m:1:876315805:F2F5DA73CD487F5D29CDC70F501BA453:r)

Thank you, Peter. I am proud of everything you've done.

-Donald J. Trump

| Friend,

Election Day is here, and we could not be more excited.

**This race may be a dead heat, but I know Greg and Lesley will _WIN_ today if every one of our supporters casts their vote today!**

If you haven't yet voted, please make sure to get to your polling location before 8:00 p.m. tonight and cast your ballot for the Gianforte/Robinson ticket. |

body:

---
Hey friends,

You probably don't need any reminding -- but it's ELECTION DAY!

[**Voting starts in ONE HOUR (and polls stay open from 7:00am to 8:00pm). Are you ready to vote for Katie? Find your polling place now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3863574858029858816/-391223829348745216)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3863574858029858816/-391223829348745216)
---

Don't forget that Toomey won his race by fewer than 9 votes per precinct, and today is going to be even closer. We need EVERYBODY to cast their ballots today -- yours could be the one that makes the difference.

So today: GO VOTE -- and then call your family, remind your neighbors, text your friends, and post as much as you can on Facebook, Instagram and Twitter.

[**Ready to go? Find your polling place now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3863574858029858816/-391223829348745216)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/find-polling-place**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3863574858029858816/-391223829348745216)

Today is the day --

Team Katie

P.S. First time voter? Don't forget to bring your ID with you to the polls today! [**You can find out what you need here >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3863574858029858816/-175051047234961408)

name: Chris Koster
subject: What we are voting for today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer |
body:
Hey,

Polling locations are officially open across Missouri. When you cast your vote today, I hope you will think of everything that is at stake in this election — issues that are far greater than just names on a ballot. Here's what we're voting for today:

- Fully funded public schools
- Equal pay for equal work
- New job creation
- A higher minimum wage
- An end to attacks on Missouri's working families
- More affordable health care

If this sounds like the vision you have for Missouri’s future, I would be honored and humbled to receive your support. Together, we can move Missouri forward and create a better life for Missouri families over the next four years.

Thank you for your tireless support,

Chris Koster

P.S. Need to look up your polling location before you vote today? Click here: act.chriskoster.com/s/go-vote-mo/

------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer |
------------------------------------------------------------------

Koster for Missouri
PO Box 1551
Jefferson City MO 65102 United States

body:

Peter, Drink your coffee. Tie your shoes. Step out your front door. And go vote. **[Polls are now open until 6 p.m., so find your polling place and vote now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5252543393862121472/-1380773798361036800?utm_campaign=gotv_eday1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161108_gotv_gq_eday1_ful__jg)** This long, long campaign season is coming to an end. **[The only thing left for you to do is show up.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5252543393862121472/-1380773798361036800?utm_campaign=gotv_eday1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&refcode=em16_161108_gotv_gq_eday1_ful__jg)** We're expecting record turnout in this election. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your last chance. |

Friend, I just asked my political director to send me a list of all our supporters who’ve voted so far in your state. Will your name be on it? Friend, America needs you to go vote. The fate of our country depends upon your vote. Please immediately go here to confirm your polling location. All your hard work -- everything you’ve done -- comes down to this single moment. YOU get to stand up to the political elites that have sent our jobs overseas, left our borders wide open, entangled us in unwinnable wars, abandoned our vets, and left us with horrible health care under ObamaCare. YOU get to deliver REAL CHANGE for our country that revives our economy and puts America First. YOU get to exercise your God-given right as an American and usher in a new future of American GREATNESS. But it will not happen unless you go vote. Please check your polling location immediately and go vote. Thank you, Donald J. Trump Find My Polling Location

name: Ben Carson
subject: Who Will Show Up?
body:
Every election is determined by the people who show up!| [View this email in your browser.
](http://email.bencarson.com/p/vWRotuiuND)
---|---
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38626460:WRotuiuND:m:1:876315805:1A325B914B123F3BEA755C24A82D61BE:r)
---
* * *

Dear Peter,

On this election day, I'm reminded of this quote:
_" ...Half the Christians in America aren't even registered to vote, and of those who are, only half go to the polls... When we withhold our influence and participation, we yield by default to those who promote immoral and destructive policies." _
Calvin Coolidge - 1872-1933, 30th President of the United States
If you are reading this message and have already voted, I and everyone at My Faith Votes, thank you for wanting to shape the future of our nation.

If you have not voted yet and are registered, we ask you to make the effort and not "...**yield by default** to those who promote immoral and destructive policies."

[Find your polling location here.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/38626461:WRotuiuND:m:1:876315805:1A325B914B123F3BEA755C24A82D61BE:r)
God bless the United States of America! In Christ,
Ben CarsonMy Faith Votes
---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Your last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Be a winner tonight. |

Friend, Your support has meant the world to me and my family. Remember when we were at 1% in the polls, and the media said we could never win the primary? You are the reason we stand here today. And tonight we have the opportunity to prove them wrong once again. Tonight is our chance to write the greatest American comeback story in the history of politics. My team is going to be giving me a list of Election Day Donors who stepped up to help fund an emergency pool of resources as game-day decisions are made in critical states between now and the close of polls. I’ll be on calls with our political director and the RNC all day, determining which states need last-minute resources. This is your LAST CHANCE to step up and officially put your name down as someone who made a contribution to Make America Great Again! Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FIRST AND FINAL contribution of the entire election. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $65 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT You have the chance to join your fellow Americans in writing a story of hope -- that November 8, 2016 was the day We The People took back our country and delivered justice to the forgotten men and women of America. Millions of Americans have already stepped up, chipping in $1, $5, $10 -- and just last month it added up to $100 MILLION. Your contribution today -- no matter the amount -- will be a sign of unwavering support at the final hour, and will help fund an emergency fund of resources used for last-minute decisions based on our internal polls. Please make your FIRST AND FINAL contribution of the entire campaign and get on my list of Election Day Donors. Thank you, Friend. I am proud of everything you’ve done. -Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: Be a winner tonight. | Friend, Your support has meant the world to me and my family. Remember when we were at 1% in the polls, and the media said we could never win the primary? You are the reason we stand here today. And tonight we have the opportunity to prove them wrong once again. Tonight is our chance to write the greatest American comeback story in the history of politics. My team is going to be giving me a list of Election Day Donors who stepped up to help fund an emergency pool of resources as game-day decisions are made in critical states between now and the close of polls. I’ll be on calls with our political director and the RNC all day, determining which states need last-minute resources. This is your LAST CHANCE to step up and officially put your name down as someone who made a contribution to Make America Great Again! Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FIRST AND FINAL contribution of the entire election. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $65 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT You have the chance to join your fellow Americans in writing a story of hope -- that November 8, 2016 was the day We The People took back our country and delivered justice to the forgotten men and women of America. Millions of Americans have already stepped up, chipping in $1, $5, $10 -- and just last month it added up to $100 MILLION. Your contribution today -- no matter the amount -- will be a sign of unwavering support at the final hour, and will help fund an emergency fund of resources used for last-minute decisions based on our internal polls. Please make your FIRST AND FINAL contribution of the entire campaign and get on my list of Election Day Donors. Thank you, Friend. I am proud of everything you’ve done. -Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Today's the day!
body:
Ready to vote? | Derek --

It's Election Day! Millions of Americans are casting their ballots today and participating in our democracy.

I want to thank you for having my back during this campaign. This team gave me the strength to keep fighting.

**This is the final step of the long journey we’ve been on together, but now it's in your hands. Make history by heading to the polls today:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=2&rj=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&rt=0)
Thank you -- let's go!

Hillary

P.S. Pass this along to your friends who may still need to confirm where they vote.

| **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjcwMDU2ODIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzYwOTQ1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
Since we launched this campaign a little more than 100 days ago, we knew November 8 would be here before too long. Now I’m excited to say that today | | | | | | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/15e1aa1b6452452cbc5cae160bba3c73?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b1a1c4d0964e442c97664e60a4049321&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_pagename=election%20day&utm_term=vote_ed&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161108-2-answer-the-call-20889-vote&utm_source=iterable) |

| | | | Friend, Since we launched this campaign a little more than 100 days ago, we knew November 8 would be here before too long. **Now I’m excited to say that today is finally Election Day!****
**Millions of dedicated and committed Hoosiers who have helped us along the way will now have the chance to stand up and make their voice heard in this historic election. They’re ready to answer the call; the question is, will you? **[Find your polling location on our Election HQ website and vote today!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/73b1ce197bda4522a214aba3d200faa2?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b1a1c4d0964e442c97664e60a4049321&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_pagename=election%20day&utm_term=vote_ed&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161108-2-answer-the-call-20889-vote&utm_source=iterable)**
---
| | [ Find my polling location ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/9ffbd656238e4ec0a93a0e7516e362b8?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=b1a1c4d0964e442c97664e60a4049321&utm_medium=button_body_text&utm_pagename=election%20day&utm_term=vote_ed&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161108-2-answer-the-call-20889-vote&utm_source=iterable)
---
**Thank you for helping us get to this day, now all we need you to do is answer the call... _and vote!_**** ** Thank you,Eric Holcomb

name: Corry Bliss
subject: Polls are open!
body:
| Peter \--

Today is the day! Polls are now open and voters all across Ohio are lining up to cast their ballots.

In this race, voters have a clear choice between moving forward with Rob’s pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

If you’re not sure where to vote, [click here](http://vote.robportman.com?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_1&n=1) or below to find your polling location.

[](http://vote.robportman.com?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_1&n=2)
For nearly two years, we've been knocking on doors, making phone calls, and campaigning across Ohio contacting over 5.8 million targeted voters. And it all comes down to this.

The fate of our Republican Senate majority comes down to Ohio, and Rob cannot win without your vote.

If you’ve already already voted for Rob or you plan on voting for Rob, please share your support by clicking below.

[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fhrefshare.com%2Fa5b4f&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_1&n=3)
[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fhrefshare.com%2F37624&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_1&n=4)
Thank you again for all of your support. Sincerely,

Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_1&n=5)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_1&n=6)

---

body:

This is the moment we've been working toward for a long, long time. This is your chance to make your voice heard.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a91/2fde7c66/4359994e/156930e5/2245352904/VEsH/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")
---
Friends, The polls are open! This is the moment we've been working toward for a long, long time. If you haven't already voted early, this is your chance to make your voice heard. If you did vote early, make sure all your friends and family make it to the polls. **[All the info you need is right here at www.iwillvote.com.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a91/2fde7c66/4359994e/156930e5/2245352904/VEsE/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")** Let's go out and win this thing for Roy. subject: This Is It - Polls are open
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
We started this mission over a year ago with a simple goal: end politics as usual in the state of Missouri. We knew when we started this it wasn’t going to be easy. The political class and Hillary Clinton’s political machine have played their usual tricks and put their full effort behind extending the career of a crooked politician. They even went so far as to attack my service to my fellow veterans and the work we did at the Mission Continues. They’ve shown their true colors: They will do anything—anything!—to stay in power.

This election is a simple choice: You can stand with Barack Obama, Hillary Clinton, Planned Parenthood, and Chris Koster. You can vote for more Obamacare, higher taxes, and out-of-control spending. You can vote for failure, corruption, and politics as usual.

Or, if you’re tired of all that, if you’re tired of seeing our state suffer because of the failed leadership from career politicians like Chris Koster, then join us and vote for more jobs, higher pay, safer streets, and better schools for all Missourians.

If you care about supporting our police officers and first responders, we need your vote. If you care about defending life, we need your vote. If you care about our veterans, we need your vote. If you care about our state and its future, we need your vote.

Today, we are just hours away from putting Chris Koster’s career to an end and sending the Obama-Clinton-Koster machine packing. We are going to change politics in Missouri once and for all and begin a new generation of conservative leadership to move our state forward.

But I need a few things from you in these final hours:

1. VOTE! (https://ericgreitens.com/vote/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=e957d1048f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-e957d1048f-99411629) The polls are open now. Click here to find your polling place and make your voice heard. (https://ericgreitens.com/vote/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=e957d1048f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-e957d1048f-99411629)

2. Share this message
(mailto:?subject=A%20Message%20From%20Eric%20Greitens&body=I%20wanted%20to%20share%20this%20message%20from%20Eric%20Greitens.%20We%20all%20need%20to%20get%20to%20the%20polls%20today%20and%20vote!%0A----------------------------------------------------------------------------------%0A%0AWe%20started%20this%20mission%20over%20a%20year%20ago%20with%20a%20simple%20goal%3A%20end%20politics%20as%20usual%20in%20the%20state%20of%20Missouri.%20We%20knew%20when%20we%20started%20this%20it%20wasn%E2%80%99t%20going%20to%20be%20easy.%20The%20political%20class%20and%20Hillary%20Clinton%E2%80%99s%20political%20machine%20have%20played%20their%20usual%20tricks%20and%20put%20their%20full%20effort%20behind%20extending%20the%20career%20of%20a%20crooked%20politician.%20They%20even%20went%20so%20far%20as%20to%20attack%20my%20service%20to%20my%20fellow%20veterans%20and%20the%20work%20we%20did%20at%20the%20Mission%20Continues.%20They%E2%80%99ve%20shown%20their%20true%20colors%3A%20They%20will%20do%20a
nything%E2%80%94anything!%E2%80%94to%20stay%20in%20power.%C2%A0%0A%C2%A0%0AThis%20election%20is%20a%20simple%20choice%3A%20You%20can%20stand%20with%20Barack%20Obama%2C%20Hillary%20Clinton%2C%20Planned%20Parenthood%2C%20and%20Chris%20Koster.%20You%20can%20vote%20for%20more%20Obamacare%2C%20higher%20taxes%2C%20and%20out-of-control%20spending.%20You%20can%20vote%20for%20failure%2C%20corruption%2C%20and%20politics%20as%20usual.%0A%C2%A0%0AOr%2C%20if%20you%E2%80%99re%20tired%20of%20all%20that%2C%20if%20you%E2%80%99re%20tired%20of%20seeing%20our%20state%20suffer%20because%20of%20the%20failed%20leadership%20from%20career%20politicians%20like%20Chris%20Koster%2C%20then%20join%20us%20and%20vote%20for%20more%20jobs%2C%20higher%20pay%2C%20safer%20streets%2C%20and%20better%20schools%20for%20all%20Missourians.%0A%C2%A0%0AIf%20you%20care%20about%20supporting%20our%20police%20officers%20and%20first%20responders%2C%20we%20need%20your%20vote.%20If%20you%20care%20about%20defending%20life%2C%20

t%20our%20election%20night%20party%20in%20St.%20Louis%0A%0AWe%E2%80%99re%20just%20a%20few%20hours%20away%20from%20taking%20Missouri%20in%20a%20new%20direction%2C%20and%20I%E2%80%99m%20proud%20to%20stand%20with%20all%20of%20you%20as%20we%20send%20a%20message%20to%20crooked%20career%20politicians%20like%20Chris%20Koster%3A%C2%A0Your%20time%20is%20up.%C2%A0%0A%C2%A0%0AWith%20your%20help%2C%20I%20know%20we%20can%20build%20a%20Missouri%20we%20are%20proud%20to%20pass%20onto%20our%20kids%20and%20grandkids.%20%C2%A0%0A%0ABest%2C%0AEric) with five of your friends. This election is close and we need everyone to commit to spread the word about our mission and remind their friends to vote today!

3. Join us tonight (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/eric-greitens-election-night-party-tickets-29127516185?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=e957d1048f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-e957d1048f-99411629) at our Election Night Party (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/eric-greitens-election-night-party-tickets-29127516185?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=e957d1048f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_08&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-e957d1048f-99411629) in St. Louis to celebrate with other supporters from all over the state!

We’re just a few hours away from taking Missouri in a new direction, and I’m proud to stand with all of you as we send a message to crooked career politicians like Chris Koster: Your time is up.

With your help, I know we can build a Missouri we are proud to pass onto our kids and grandkids.

Best,
Eric

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

name: Barack Obama
subject: If you're not already talking to voters -- what are you waiting for?
body:
Before it's too late. | Happy Election Day, Derek!

If you’re not already out there knocking on doors or making those critical phone calls to supporters who still need to vote for Hillary today -- well, I just don’t know what you’re waiting for.

**It’s not too late! Find an event happening near you right now, sign up, and let’s make history:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=2&rj=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&rt=0)
Thank you,

Barack

P.S. **[If you’ve already voted, tell the world.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)** Share this on Facebook and tag three friends -- put the pressure on, Derek!

| **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjcwMDY0MjMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxMzY2OTM1S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Patrick
subject: quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e01/738133e4/3342e3dc/7f85be9d/853944913/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161108?refcode=pme161108_m&recurring=true&amount=25")
---
| Okay, team -- this is it. It's Election Day. I'll make this quick, because we have a full day of campaigning ahead of us.

I'm out here getting every last vote. I want to win this so badly, and with the latest poll showing us up one point, things are looking better than ever. But polls don't mean anything unless we get voters out to their polling places. [**Can you chip in $5 right now for a last-minute boost? We need to hit $50,000 by tonight to hit our Election Day GOTV Goal. Your gift will be matched.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e01/738133e4/3342e3dc/7f85be9d/853944913/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161108?refcode=pme161108_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thanks,
Patrick Murphy

P.S. If you haven't voted yet, make a plan. This is too important to stay home. Find your polling place [**here.**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e01/738133e4/3342e3dc/7f85be9e/853944913/VEsF/ "http://www.floridadems.org/where-to-vote") |

name: Maggie for NH
subject: It's Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddfe/2a380d31/146812a7/ff29f5/3657956747/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddfe/2a380d31/146812a7/ff29f5/3657956747/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Happy Election Day, everyone! The polls are now open, and Governor Hassan is counting on you to get out there today to cast your ballot.
**[Find your polling place here](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddfe/2a380d31/146812a7/ff29f6/3657956747/VEsF/ "http://iwillvote.com")** and make a plan to vote today. Remember, you can register to vote right at your polling place.
Granite Staters have a clear choice in the race for our next U.S. Senator. Do we want to keep Kelly Ayotte, a Senator who sides with corporate special interests? Or do we want to elect Maggie, a champion for hard-working families who will fight for all of us, not just those at the top?
We're so proud of everything this team has accomplished so far, but if _any one of us doesn't make it out to the polls, we could hand this seat back to Kelly Ayotte for another six years_. **[Please, take a minute to look up your polling place and send this link to your friends and family to make sure they get to the polls too.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fddfe/2a380d31/146812a7/ff29f6/3657956747/VEsC/ "http://iwillvote.com")**
Team, today is the day we prove that Maggie has the strongest grassroots support in the state. **Now, get out there and vote!**
-- Team Maggie

name: Grassroots for Steve
subject: neck-and-neck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

First, please make sure you vote today! This election is close and every vote will matter.

**Secondly,[please rush a last-minute contribution of $15.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=BuiyduqN%2F6gK4oNmCb2sDO%2BsQrmjOaGk)**

Greg Gianforte has spent almost **_$6 million of his own money_** in this campaign. He's run more TV commercials than any gubernatorial candidate in the entire country. In fact, a recent study found that if you ran his ads back to back they would last for 13 days.

But despite all of his big spending, **we 're entering Election Day with this race neck-and-neck.** That's in large part because of the incredible outpouring of grassroots support.

It's been expensive though and we still have to hit our last fundraising goal to keep us on track. **One more time --[will you pitch in $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2cGYGXAwVl5uI2JOCVbiE%2B%2BsQrmjOaGk)**

Thanks,

Grassroots for Steve

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Vermont Students Choose Phil Scott for Governor
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:**
November 8, 2016

**Media Contact:** Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Students at Essex Middle School and Colchester High School Choose Phil Scott for Governor**
Montpelier, Vt. – While Get Out The Vote (GOTV) efforts are underway across the state today, the Vermont gubernatorial race has been called at Essex Middle School and Colchester High School. Even though they aren’t old enough to vote, these students send the message that they are tuned in – and that they plan to be active in politics when they hit age 18.

Among Essex Middle Schoolers, Phil Scott scored a decisive victory over his opponents, receiving 55 percent of the vote. In Colchester, it was Scott’s ability to work across the aisle that earned him the most votes among the students.

[Interviews](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=79ab311236&e=19cebfe173) conducted by New England Cable News showed high schoolers in Colchester want to see more unity and collaboration among their elected officials. Scott, who’s earned tri-partisan support in the election, says he will build coalitions to tackle Vermont’s biggest challenges if elected Governor. Colchester High School also elected Hillary Clinton for President.

“Young Vermonters have a valuable perspective on the issues and political campaigns,” Scott said. “I am proud to have earned their support and hope to have the opportunity to serve them, and their families, as Vermont’s next Governor.”
###

---

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: The most important thing you can do today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
The single most important thing you can do today is get to the polls and cast your vote. **If you still need to cast your ballot in this election, look up your polling place right now:**
**[FIND MY POLLING LOCATION»](https://ourrevolution.com/page/polling-locator "https://ourrevolution.com/page/polling-locator")**
**If you've already voted and want to help get out the vote for the candidates who will fight for the ideals of our political revolution, you can make calls:**
****[MAKE CALLS TO GET OUT THE VOTE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/phonebank/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/phonebank/")****
By getting out the vote during the final hours of this election, we will help elect candidates who are prepared to take our fight to Congress, statehouses and communities across the country. And that means we'll have progressive allies in government who will stand with our movement on issues like income inequality, climate change, and getting big money out of politics.
We have the power to change the way our political system works and make it once again responsive to the needs of the people, not just the wealthy few. The most important way we can exercise that power today is by voting, or making sure others get out to vote.
Thanks for being a part of it.
\- The team at Our Revolution

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Ready to vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's Election Day. Have you voted? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTgzMzYwMAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDYwMjc1MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, **It 's Election Day. Have you voted?** Today is one of the most historic Election Days in a generation. Voting is easy. It's important. And this year, we have an unprecedented opportunity to vote for progress. **To day, across Washington and America, tens of millions of us are exercising one of our basic rights: the right to vote.** Men and women have fought -- and died -- for this right throughout our 240-year history. The right to vote has come at a price -- and it has not been won easily. We should not take the right to vote lightly. That's why I'm urging you to vote today and make sure your friends do the same. With so much at stake, it's vital we turn out. **To vote, your ballot must be postmarked by t oday. Or, you can return it to a ballot drop box by 8:00 p.m.** [**If you 're not sure where your nearest ballot drop box is located, you can click here to find out >>>**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=OTgzMzYwMAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDYwMjc1MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) **And I 'm asking for your vote to continue serving as your governor.** I have been honored and humbled to serve over the past four years. As governor, I have had the opportunity to make our state stronger and keep it moving forward. With your help and support, I want to continue the progress we have made together. Trudi and I are deeply grateful for your support and friendship. Thank you for your trust and confidence, Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=OTgzMzYwMAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDYwMjc1MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Paul Tencher
subject: Tonight (last chance)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50616/7be36b49/1e2cd979/78f9606f/1501495137/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
Friend,

Tonight, we should know how this race ends, one way or another.

But tonight's not here yet -- which means **Team Bayh is still fighting our hearts out to elect Evan.**

**[You can help by rushing over a $5 last-minute donation.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50616/7be36b49/1e2cd979/78f9606e/1501495137/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161108nd&amount=10")** It'll go right out to our Get Out The Vote team, which is spending these last few hours calling even more Hoosiers, talking to voters outside polling places, and driving folks to vote.

**[This is your last chance to donate $5 to help Evan win, Friend. Don't miss it.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50616/7be36b49/1e2cd979/78f9606e/1501495137/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161108nd&amount=10")**

**And if you haven 't voted yet, please do. _In a race as close as this one, every vote will make a difference, including yours_.** Don't forget to **[review photo ID requirements](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50616/7be36b49/1e2cd979/78f9606d/1501495137/VEsC/ "http://www.in.gov/sos/elections/2401.htm")** , then **[find your polling place](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50616/7be36b49/1e2cd979/78f9606c/1501495137/VEsD/ "https://indianavoters.in.gov/PublicSite/Public/FT1/PublicLookupMain.aspx?Link=Polling")**. Polls close at 6 p.m.

I believe in this team and the powerful campaign we've built together. We've shown that Indiana won't settle for the status quo of gridlock and obstruction; we demand leaders in Washington who will fight for us.

**Now let 's go win this thing.**

Paul Tencher
Campaign Manager **************[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50616/7be36b49/1e2cd979/78f96073/1501495137/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161108nd&amount=25")**************
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

* * *

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

[Unsubscribe](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50616/7be36b49/1e2cd979/78f96072/1501495137/VEsB/ "https://bayh.bsd.net/unsubscribe")
Contributions or gifts to the Evan Bayh Committee are not tax deductible.

subject: I need go-getters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate
body:

| |

| For over a year, we've worked toward this moment, this day, this opportunity for a new beginning.

Now it's finally here. **The polls are open and it 's time for North Carolinians to pick the future they want for themselves and their children.**

But our work isn't finished. Today is Election Day and our Get Out the Vote effort is underway. Our field team is making sure everyone gets to the polls.

We still need your help and enthusiasm though. Our field team can always do more. They can reach one more neighborhood, make one more call, and help shuttle one more group of voters to their polling place.

**Every time I 've asked this grassroots team for help, you've responded.**

[_**So now I 'm asking again, when it counts the most. Can you please help make sure our Get Out the Vote operation is as strong as it can be? Rush in $5>>**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42052/2cc31c44/41d5c68/19f9df54/3406565907/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161108pm?refcode=dre161108pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

And of course, if you've already voted, thank you -- you're on top of it! But if you still need to vote, [_**make sure you know where to vote and have a plan to get to your polling place.**_](https://secure.deborahross.com/page/m/45f42052/2cc31c44/41d5c68/19f9df54/3406565907/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dre161108pm?refcode=dre161108pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thank you,

Deborah |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chad=20Huber=2C=20Data=20Director?=
subject: Preliminary Returns [Do not share]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
I've been pouring over the returns and wanted to give you an update. It's looking strong but there are some areas where our voters just haven't come out yet.

I just compiled a list of these voters but I need your help to reach them.
Peter,
I need you to make 50 calls right now and get these folks to the polls for Eric. It's simple, just follow these instructions:

1. On your smartphone, go to
call4eric.com and download our app, i360 Call

2. In the app, login with the following credentials:

username: 2241eday
password: earnit

3. Tap the survey and then tap Use this App

Follow the on-screen prompts and you'll be connected with one of these voters within seconds.

At this point, it's simple. If we can get these voters to the polls, we will win.

Chad Huber
Data Director

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. clean_body: Peter, I've been pouring over the returns and wanted to give you an update. It's looking strong but there are some areas where our voters just haven't come out yet. I just compiled a list of these voters but I need your help to reach them. Peter, I need you to make 50 calls right now and get these folks to the polls for Eric. It's simple, just follow these instructions: 1. On your smartphone, go to call4eric.com and download our app, i360 Call 2. In the app, login with the following credentials: username: 2241eday password: earnit 3. Tap the survey and then tap Use this App Follow the on-screen prompts and you'll be connected with one of these voters within seconds. At this point, it's simple. If we can get these voters to the polls, we will win. Chad Huber Data Director Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer 4579 Laclede Avenue #138 St. Louis, Missouri 63108 Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. subject: When We Vote, We Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Vote today. |

Friend, Americans have been casting their ballots for weeks. Millions of votes are already waiting to be counted. Many of those ballots have come from your friends and neighbors. Today, we need your vote because of one simple truth: when we vote, we win. Find your polling location right now on Vote.gop. When Republicans show up at the polls, good things happen. In 2010 we flipped the map to take over the House and in 2014 we did the same to take control of the Senate. Today the White House and that Senate majority are at stake. If people like you didn’t show up in 2010 or 2014 we could not have won those elections. Today, we need you again. If you haven’t found your polling location yet, visit Vote.GOP right now to get more information on polling sites and times. Vote today for your country’s future, Chris Carr Political Director, RNC Find My Polling Location

name: Roy Cooper
subject: It's up to us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
It's up to us to decide who leads North Carolina for the next four years. Polls are open across North Carolina. Grab your friends, neighbors, and family members -- everything you need to know is here:
It's up to us to decide who leads North Carolina for the next four years. Polls are open across North Carolina. Grab your friends, neighbors, and family members -- everything you need to know is here: www.iwillvote.com.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a9a/2fde7c66/43456cec/156930aa/1555478050/VEsH/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")
---
It's up to us now, friends. It's up to us to decide who leads North Carolina for the next four years. Our kids are in underfunded schools and teachers are leaving our state for better pay and more respect. It's up to us to choose a governor who will make education a priority again. With the stroke of Governor McCrory's pen, discrimination was written into our law. Our economy has been damaged and our brand is now tarnished. It's up to us to elect forward-thinking leaders who won't put political ideology ahead of the needs of the people. Middle-class families are being taxed from birth to death, while folks at the top are getting all the breaks. It's up to us to elect a governor who will create a North Carolina who works for everyone. It's up to us now, friends. Let's get it done. **[Polls are open across North Carolina. Grab your friends, neighbors, and family members -- everything you need to know is here: www.iwillvote.com.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a9a/2fde7c66/43456cec/156930aa/1555478050/VEsE/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")** Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina, Roy | | [**Find my polling place ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a9a/2fde7c66/43456cec/156930aa/1555478050/VEsF/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: Your last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Be a winner tonight. |

Friend, Your support has meant the world to me and my family. Remember when we were at 1% in the polls, and the media said we could never win the primary? You are the reason we stand here today. And tonight we have the opportunity to prove them wrong once again. Tonight is our chance to write the greatest American comeback story in the history of politics. My team is going to be giving me a list of Election Day Donors who stepped up to help fund an emergency pool of resources as game-day decisions are made in critical states between now and the close of polls. I’ll be on calls with our political director and the RNC all day, determining which states need last-minute resources. This is your LAST CHANCE to step up and officially put your name down as someone who made a contribution to Make America Great Again! Please step up as an Election Day Donor and make your FIRST AND FINAL contribution of the entire election. CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE $65 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $35 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT You have the chance to join your fellow Americans in writing a story of hope -- that November 8, 2016 was the day We The People took back our country and delivered justice to the forgotten men and women of America. Millions of Americans have already stepped up, chipping in $1, $5, $10 -- and just last month it added up to $100 MILLION. Your contribution today -- no matter the amount -- will be a sign of unwavering support at the final hour, and will help fund an emergency fund of resources used for last-minute decisions based on our internal polls. Please make your FIRST AND FINAL contribution of the entire campaign and get on my list of Election Day Donors. Thank you, Friend. I am proud of everything you’ve done. -Donald J. Trump CONTRIBUTE $100

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

body:

| | | | Friend, I’m reaching out to you to make sure you cast your ballot. **There are still a few hours left, so if you haven’t voted yet, please make your way to the polls and make your voice heard!****

body:
I've attempted to run a campaign WE can all be proud of, one based on principle and policy and resolutely pointed toward progress. A campaign | | | | | | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/523c85dfc807467ca907b6601fa48ab2?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=2bcac0aa647f4e2394e488b759a1494d&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_pagename=election%20day&utm_term=vote_ed&utm_campaign=gotv&utm_content=20161108-3-lets-do-this-20889-vote&utm_source=iterable) |

| | | | Friend, I've attempted to run a campaign WE can all be proud of, one based on principle and policy and resolutely pointed toward progress.
A campaign marked by boldness and character, an effort attracting both veteran & rookie civic-minded citizens who above all else seek to take our state to the next level.
During my statewide travels, I've been fortunate to meet so many willing to join us on this journey.
Good things are wanting to be done and I can't wait to work on the next steps.
---
****Encouraged, Eric

name: Steve Bullock
subject: my last ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

**This is my last ask of the election.[Will you donate $20?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=GeIzeQAUN6av5ZLSEf0YlZjNf7u%2BU8id)**

Even against all Greg Gianforte's millions, we're here on Election Day in a strong position. **I can't thank you enough.**

This campaign is over in 4 hours. Your contribution lets me know that the Montana values I've fought for during this race -- access to public lands, fiscal responsibility, equal pay for women, good public schools and no statewide sales tax -- matter to you as well.

Thank you for being a part of this,

Steve Bullock

clean_body: | | | | | It's finally Election Day, and we're feeling a lot of emotions on Team Ross. But mostly, the prevailing mood is excitement. We're ready to get out the vote, elect Deborah, and help Democrats reclaim the Senate majority. This is everything we've been working toward for the past year. Thanks to your grassroots support, the polls are tied. Now it's going to come down to who can get their supporters out to vote. "" Thank you, Team Ross | Paid for by Deborah Ross for Senate Deborah Ross for Senate P.O. Box 28258 Raleigh NC 27611 United States This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com "" to unsubscribe ""

body:

And right now we're up against **$15 MILLION from the GOP** getting Republicans to the polls from Nevada to New Hampshire.

name: Christine Harbin
subject: No matter who wins...
body:
| | [Web Version](http://view.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=3f38a7355f6063b80084993fd13bf3a719e57258d4f085a575ee07e430cde57bbef1157aa0978d40ca1723fdfee52c1eb59c060de4262c15eec6e43870cd7d9eb06396b1c0d37037)
---
| |
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c21e193a67482afced29988ee680324c3e2a08d074e366680b00acad9bfe0596cb2b754d1be81455)
---
| | Hi Peter,

To say it's been a strange year in politics would be an understatement, but there are so many reasons to optimistic about the future.

Not even a crazy election year could stop the **unprecedented groundswell of support** for less government intervention and more personal liberty, led by our grassroots army of over 2.8 million activists spread across the country.

[](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c21e193a67482afc7114984f94e7a316234fb1ffd1ae4b3eebf06d52ecedb8b193d74ba5b6a32525) **Our activists have made history, spreading the ideas of economic freedom and prosperity in the process...**_They haven't just been out advocating against big-government Senate candidates, they've also been making a positive argument for free-market reforms that can advance prosperity and make government more accountable to the taxpayer!_ [](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=c21e193a67482afc7114984f94e7a316234fb1ffd1ae4b3eebf06d52ecedb8b193d74ba5b6a32525) **...and our work is far from over.**_No matter who is elected today_ \- for the Senate, the House of Representatives, or the Presidency - there will always be a long line of politicians itching to expand their control, limit your freedoms, and threaten your way of life.

That's why we must continue to make a difference through our best-in-class grassroots model -- using cutting-edge tools to educate the public, and help them turn up the pressure on our lawmakers to do the right thing. It's a strategy that has helped us save taxpayers tens of billions of dollars in 25 different states in the last two years alone. This year, we're going to make sure our efforts are also felt at the federal level like never before. Look out for more messages from us this week as we roll out our priorities for change in Congress during the "lame duck" session before our new president is sworn in.

Remember, you can help defend the **American Dream** no matter who's in office -- because it's us, the public, who get to set the agenda.

The American dream is worth fighting for, and with your help, we can preserve it for our children and for generations to come.

We'll be in touch,

Chrissy Harbin
Director of Federal Affairs and Strategic Initiatives
Americans for Prosperity

---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hi Peter, To say it's been a strange year in politics would be an understatement, but there are so many reasons to optimistic about the future. Not even a crazy election year could stop the unprecedented groundswell of support for less government intervention and more personal liberty, led by our grassroots army of over 2.8 million activists spread across the country. Our activists have made history, spreading the ideas of economic freedom and prosperity in the process...They haven't just been out advocating against big-government Senate candidates, they've also been making a positive argument for free-market reforms that can advance prosperity and make government more accountable to the taxpayer! ...and our work is far from over.No matter who is elected today \- for the Senate, the House of Representatives, or the Presidency - there will always be a long line of politicians itching to expand their control, limit your freedoms, and threaten your way of life. That's why we must continue to make a difference through our best-in-class grassroots model -- using cutting-edge tools to educate the public, and help them turn up the pressure on our lawmakers to do the right thing. It's a strategy that has helped us save taxpayers tens of billions of dollars in 25 different states in the last two years alone. This year, we're going to make sure our efforts are also felt at the federal level like never before. Look out for more messages from us this week as we roll out our priorities for change in Congress during the "lame duck" session before our new president is sworn in. Remember, you can help defend the American Dream no matter who's in office -- because it's us, the public, who get to set the agenda. The American dream is worth fighting for, and with your help, we can preserve it for our children and for generations to come. We'll be in touch, Chrissy Harbin Director of Federal Affairs and Strategic Initiatives Americans for Prosperity

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I cast my ballot for Hillary Clinton today
body:
| Derek --

I am pretty thrilled to tell you that earlier today, I cast my ballot in my hometown of Richmond, Virginia. [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) I wanted to be first at my polling place, but 99-year-old Minerva Turpin beat me to it. Looks like I need to get used to being number two!

It’s been an honor to be on this team with you -- and an even greater honor to cast my ballot for the first woman president.

**If you've voted, too, get your "I Voted!" e-sticker, and show the world you're one of the millions of people who have proudly cast their ballot:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Talk to you soon,

Tim

P.S. If you still need to cast your ballot, you can **[confirm where you'll vote right here.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

| **** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjcwMTE5OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDkzNDc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jessica Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Bring us home -- make calls right now!
body:
Ready to sprint to the finish? | Hey Derek!

Me again. Wanted to give you a quick update on our call goal. We’re about 54 percent of the way there. We still have about six hours left until polls close in states like Nevada and Arizona so there’s plenty of time to make up ground.

Want to hear something incredible? We’ve already had 15,324 people in Virginia making calls TODAY. **Wanna join them? Sign up for a last-minute shift right now:** | [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks!

Jess

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: FWD: Update: We're calling voters and we need your help
Derek --

Dropping a quick line: We need 1,500 people to **[call into Pennsylvania right now.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**Can you help?**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---
You’re truly incredible,

Jess

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: Update: We're calling voters and we need your help
Derek --

Happy Election Day! HQ is buzzing, field offices are PACKED across the country with nearly a million volunteers, and hundreds of thousands of people are hitting the phones from their homes (and playgrounds and offices and rest stops -- you get the picture).

This team is literally giving it ALL they have. Are you doing everything you can? **[Will you sign up for at least ONE hour-long call shift before polls close.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We have a big goal today: 1.5 million calls. Here’s how that breaks down: 45 people from your area need to pledge to do just one shift and make 50 calls each. It’s totally doable.

These calls have proven time and time again to help turn out voters who might have otherwise sat it out -- in an election with just so much at stake, that is a risk none of us can afford to take.

**Derek, just one hour can make a huge difference for Hillary. Please help:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjcwMTI1NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNDk3ODIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rob's iPhone
subject: Asking for your vote
body:
| Peter \--

I just voted and I am on my way to talk to voters before they head into the polls.

In this race, Ohio voters have a clear choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

Peter, I’m asking for your vote.

If you’re not sure where to vote, [click here](http://vote.robportman.com?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_2&n=1) or below to find your polling location.

[](http://vote.robportman.com?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_2&n=2)
I’m so proud of all the hard work our incredible team has put in contacting over 6 million voters since May of last year.

I was elected to the U.S. Senate to get results for Ohio, and that’s what I’ve done. I’ve had over 45 of my bills signed into law, including laws to fight Ohio’s heroin crisis, combat human trafficking, help create jobs, and fight government waste.

I’d appreciate your vote today so I can continue to get results for Ohio. All best, Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_2&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_2&n=4)[

](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_2&n=5)
---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ed_2&n=6). -=-=-
