name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Bryant=20for=20Governor?=
subject: An election day message from Team Bryant
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=586dc1a8c6&e=32f1a3df98)
---
| |
---
| | Friend

You’re politically active and have already voted or made a plan to - but according to the Secretary of State nearly half our state has yet to mail their ballot as of this weekend.

According to the final poll, we’re up by 7 points among people who hadn’t voted as of last Friday. Right now, you can do two things to help us make sure each and every one of those folks returns a ballot today:
1. Call your friends and family to make sure they know they have until 8PM tonight to return their ballot to a ballot box.
2. [**Contribute to our final GOTV goal of $5,000 today.**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=61ce75bbe4&e=32f1a3df98) We put every dime into our turnout programs – boosting online ads and taking care of our phone bankers.

We have such a great team of over 200 volunteers working hard day and night to turn out voters. We’re doing everything we can – and it’s because of supporters like you who have helped us since the beginning.

We’re asking one last time for your help. Can you chip in?
**[Chip in $25](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=402430188a&e=32f1a3df98) \- [Chip in $50](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=274476acaa&e=32f1a3df98) \- [Chip in More](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=e83caf75b7&e=32f1a3df98)**
Thank you for all your support, now let's go win this!

**Team Bryant**

name: matt@dscc.org
subject: Our last email of the election (really)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm checking in before polls close with the single most important question of this election... [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccabvote?refcode=DPE-20161108-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- With just hours left before polls close, I'm checking in because the most important thing you can do today is vote. **Do you still need to cast a ballot?**

| **[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efaa/2b07114c/42fc4c2b/735f1267/3429024096/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/i-will-vote")**
---

**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccabvote?refcode=DPE-20161108-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
---
**There 's still time to make your voice heard and help get out as many votes possible to take back the Senate. **Even an extra $5 right now could inform several undecided voters how high the stakes are.

But our time is running out to launch one last boost to our Get Out the Vote efforts. I know we email often, but this is truly your final chance to make an impact in must-win Senate races.

[**Friend, your commitment to elect Democrats has never mattered more. Please pitch in whatever you can -- victory tonight depends on it.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccabvote?refcode=DPE-20161108-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Let's go win!
Matt Kehres
Digital Director, DSCC

P.S. Have friends or family who need to vote? Know someone looking to make a difference for Democrats? **Forward this email to 3 people ASAP!**

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efaa/2b07114c/42fc4c2b/735f1266/3429024096/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efaa/2b07114c/42fc4c2b/735f1261/3429024096/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954efaa/2b07114c/42fc4c2b/735f1260/3429024096/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Bill Cole
subject: Did you VOTE?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend -- I wanted to send one final follow up to remind you that you only have 2 hours left to vote! Polls close promptly at 7:30 p.m. But remember, if you’re in line, you CAN vote. I am in a tight race with my opponent. I have a plan to place our state in the right direction. Please vote for me, Bill Cole, today. Are you still unsure of where to vote? **[Click here](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fservices.sos.wv.gov%2FElections%2FVoter%2FFindMyPollingPlace&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=election_day_5&n=1 "Vote Bill Cole! subject: Keep it up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
If you haven't voted yet, you still have time to get to the polls before they close at 7:30pm. If you have voted, call your friends and family and make sure they've voted.
If you haven't voted yet, you still have time to get to the polls before they close at 7:30pm. If you have voted, call your friends and family and make sure they've voted.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a99/2fde7c66/43403d00/15693061/3152037620/VEsH/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")

Friends, We're getting back great reports from our grassroots teams on the ground. This race is going to be close but if we do what we have to do tonight, we can win this thing. If you haven't voted yet, you still have time to get to the polls before they close at 7:30pm. If you have voted, call your friends and family and make sure they've voted. **[All the information you need is right here at www.iWillVote.com.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202a99/2fde7c66/43403d00/15693061/3152037620/VEsE/ "http://www.iwillvote.com")** This election has too much riding on it to sit it out. Let's go make some history, friends. Trey Nix

name: Jessica Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
subject: A key voter is waiting to hear from you
body:
Ready to sprint to the finish? | Derek --

This is it, my final ask.

**Will you make 25 calls right now?** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Polls start closing in key states like North Carolina and Florida at 7:00 p.m. ET tonight. If voters are in line before polls close, they can STILL cast their ballots. We need YOU to tell them that.

Ready. Set. Dial.

See you on the other side of history.

Thanks,

Jess

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: Bring us home -- make calls right now! Hey Derek!

Me again. Wanted to give you a quick update on our call goal. We’re about 54 percent of the way there. We still have about six hours left until polls close in states like Nevada and Arizona so there’s plenty of time to make up ground.

Want to hear something incredible? We’ve already had 15,324 people in Virginia making calls TODAY. **Wanna join them? Sign up for a last-minute shift right now:** | [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Thanks!

Jess

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: FWD: Update: We're calling voters and we need your help
Derek --

Dropping a quick line: We need 1,500 people to **[call into Pennsylvania right now.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

**Can you help?**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

---
You’re truly incredible,

Jess

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Jessica Morales Rocketto, HillaryClinton.com
Subject: Update: We're calling voters and we need your help
Derek --

Happy Election Day! HQ is buzzing, field offices are PACKED across the country with nearly a million volunteers, and hundreds of thousands of people are hitting the phones from their homes (and playgrounds and offices and rest stops -- you get the picture).

This team is literally giving it ALL they have. Are you doing everything you can? **[Will you sign up for at least ONE hour-long call shift before polls close.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We have a big goal today: 1.5 million calls. Here’s how that breaks down: 45 people from your area need to pledge to do just one shift and make 50 calls each. It’s totally doable.

These calls have proven time and time again to help turn out voters who might have otherwise sat it out -- in an election with just so much at stake, that is a risk none of us can afford to take.

**Derek, just one hour can make a huge difference for Hillary. Please help:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Jess

Jessica Morales Rocketto
Digital Organizing Director
Hillary for America

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjcwMTMzNzgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIxNTAzMTk3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
